description: Legal document in Arabic script. Dated: 426 AH = 1034/35 CE. The year 424 is also mentioned in the body of the document (l. 1). The document concerns the tax farming rights over a certain district (nāḥiya, ll. 3, 6). Mentions capitation taxes (jawālī) and seed advances (taqāwī) (l. 4). Witnesses include Jāmiʿ b. Abī l-[...]; Musāfir b. Abī l-Ḥusayn; Abū Ṭāhir b. [...]; Ibrāhīm b. ʿĪsā b. Muḥammad al-Khatīb(?). Merits further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
